# How to drive traffic even BEFORE launching your site

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-02-27 19:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 577

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Ever wonder why big brands always have those sleek "coming soon"
pages before they launch something new?

A well-crafted coming soon page is a powerful tool that can
create buzz and anticipation.

Most importantly, it can even get you a jump start on SEO before
your site’s even launched.

The best part? You don't need to be a tech wizard to create one.

Today, I'll show you exactly how to build a coming soon page that
turns casual visitors into excited subscribers.

👉 Learn how to create your coming soon page in WordPress 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..kkhORuiTPPWr1Kyb5GZPZRViSsN8bESOsavM9_O7mSo )


Without a coming soon page…

- It takes a lot of time for your site to be ranked on Google
even after your launch.

- You can’t drive traffic to your site before the launch, which
hinders your growth.

- You can’t connect to your audience because there’s no way to
build an email list of interested users.

So go ahead and read the article 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..kkhORuiTPPWr1Kyb5GZPZRViSsN8bESOsavM9_O7mSo )
 here.

Think of the coming soon page as placing an "Opening Soon" sign
on a storefront - except this sign actively builds your customer
base!

Talk soon,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
